# jellyfin_users (Data Source)

Lists all Jellyfin users on the server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jellyfin_users" "all" {}

output "user_names" {
  value = [for u in data.jellyfin_users.all.users : u.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `users` (Attributes List) The list of users. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--users))

<a id="nestedatt--users"></a>
### Nested Schema for `users`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) The unique user identifier.
- `is_administrator` (Boolean) Whether the user is an administrator.
- `is_disabled` (Boolean) Whether the user is disabled.
- `name` (String) The username.
